stemHtml: ATC asks the pilot: "Advise able RNAV offset". What does this mean?

options.a: ATC is asking he/she if he/she can fly with a new relative heading, provided by ATC.
options.b: ATC is asking if he/she can accept a parallel route offset from a standard route.
options.c: ATC is asking if he/she can turn his/her RNAV equipment off.
options.d: ATC is asking if he/she can fly in RVSM.
